title: Ludwig II: Glanz und Ende eines Königs
writer: Georg Hurdalek, Peter Berneis, Kadidja Wedekind
actors: O.W. Fischer, Marianne Koch, Paul Bildt
plot: King Ludwig II of Bavaria is frustrated, having to accept parliament's will to join Bismarck, rather he his cultured Habsburg friends, in wars. His love-life being as fruitless, he seeks comfort in art. But building fairytale cast...
